title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Denjiro, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #14, Oden as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Are you crying, kin-chan?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Of course not!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: 0- Tsuru... that man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would happily die for someone like him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Are you sure 'You are NOT CR'ING!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I feel the same way!!

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: Hey, wait up, Denjiro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He inspired me first!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The emotional weight is different!! I will be his first follower!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I envy their free spirits....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "I want to go with them, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At that moment, these men suppressed their desire to follow open.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: NAND - THE HAKUMAI REGION

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And on this day... the balance of the capital was tilted... in more ways than one.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Welcome, welcome, Lord Oden!! It is a pleasure to make your acquainted- once!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuie has been looking forward to your arrival!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop lying!! No way he would be happy to see me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You are correct!! I would not...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get excited over an exiled fool from the Capital!!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: What do you want, Oden!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you even brought some henchmen with you!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah!! Please hold on, there is a puddle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right, please step over me to cross the puddle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Uncle!! What is with this creepy weirdo!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not be so rude!!...he is my newest servant.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I'm not sure if I can't get any more of the time to do with the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Heh heh!! I was taken in by Lord Yasuie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My name is Crochi, I am but a humble servant.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 28 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
